name: Sanjay
introduction: 2018-Present: Science teacher under Assam Board of Secondary Education. 2017: Completed B.Ed. with specialization in science education. 2016: Earned M.Sc. degree with distinction in Physical Sciences. 2019: Received "Excellence in Teaching" recognition from district education office. 2020: Led student team to state-level science exhibition finals. 2021: Completed advanced certification in laboratory instruction techniques. 2022: Developed innovative teaching modules adopted by three neighboring schools. 2023: Appointed as science department coordinator. 2024: Published article on regional teaching methodologies in education journal. 2025: Currently mentoring new science teachers while maintaining excellent student pass rates.
